locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

locations.name: 智利
locations.summary: 智利共和国（西班牙語：República de Chile），通稱智利（西班牙語：Chile），是位於南美洲的国家，智利西部与南部濒临太平洋，北靠秘鲁，东邻玻利维亚及阿根廷。為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國。除此之外，智利与厄瓜多尔相同，是两個不…

locations.name: 火地群岛
locations.summary: 火地群岛（西班牙語：Archipiélago de Tierra del Fuego）是南美洲最南端的一个群岛，由主岛火地岛及周边小岛组成，总面积73,753平方公里。其主岛火地岛西半部以及其西、南部的全部岛屿均归属于智利境內麦哲伦-智利…

relations.subject: Rufous-tailed hawk
relations.evidence: Rufous-tailed hawks are threatened by many factors, especially habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Rufous-tailed hawk
relations.evidence: Rufous-tailed hawks have been losing their habitat because of logging, over grazing by sheep and cattle, and the growth of Pinus and Eucalyptus plantations. Pinus radiata and Eucalyptus globulus are fast-growing invasive plants that were introduced in order to spur the timber industry in Chile. The other main threat to rufous-tailed hawks are local people, who sometimes kill these birds because rufous-tailed hawks attack and eat their domesticated animals
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
